## Description

<!-- Please include a concise summary of the change and the issue it resolves. -->

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change

Please check the options that are relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Tech debt, refactoring, or documentation
- [ ] UI/UX changes (if applicable, attach screenshots)

## Verification

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this codebase
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have verified that the project compiles and builds locally
